summary: Iteration 9 Testing Complete - Live Streaming feature fully functional. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components tested and working.
critical_code_review_comments: Live streaming eligibility correctly checks tier (subscriber) OR (50 likes + 100 points)
Time limits per tier correctly implemented: Free=5min, Prime=15min, Pro=30min, Ultra=60min, Mega=480min
A la carte packs correctly priced: live_30=$1.99, live_60=$3.99
WebSocket signaling endpoint properly handles broadcaster/viewer roles with WebRTC offer/answer/ICE
Stream recording URL saved when stream ends
Like toggle works correctly on streams
Bonus minutes reset to 0 after starting a stream (consumed)
Webhook handler correctly processes live_time pack type

trial_user.note: User on 7-day prime trial from iteration 8

seed_data_creation: Test streams created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Streaming feature fully tested: 1) Admin (MEGA tier) is eligible with 480 base minutes. 2) Free user on prime trial is also eligible with 15 base minutes. 3) All REST endpoints working: eligibility, start, end, like, active, recordings, my-streams, purchase-time-points. 4) WebSocket endpoint defined at /api/ws/live/{stream_id} with token and role query params. 5) Stripe integration for live_30 and live_60 packs working. 6) Frontend shows Live link with NEW badge in sidebar, Go Live button for eligible users, stream setup form with title and category, tabs for Live Now/Recordings/My Streams. 7) Membership page shows live time packs in A La Carte section.

eligibility_endpoint.notes: Returns eligible, tier, base_minutes, bonus_minutes, total_minutes, points_packs, card_packs

start_stream.notes: Creates stream with correct max_duration based on tier + bonus. Rejects if already streaming.

end_stream.notes: Ends stream, saves recording_url, notifies viewers via WebSocket

active_streams.notes: Returns list of live streams, supports category filter

stream_details.notes: Returns full stream details, 404 for non-existent

purchase_time_points.notes: Deducts points, adds bonus minutes. Rejects invalid packs or insufficient points.

websocket_signaling.notes: WebSocket endpoint for WebRTC signaling. Accepts token and role query params.

live_page_ui.notes: Live page renders with Go Live button, tabs (Live Now, Recordings, My Streams)

stream_setup_form.notes: Shows title input, category selector (General Feed, Marketplace), streaming time

sidebar_live_link.notes: Live link with NEW badge in sidebar under Feeds section

membership_live_packs.notes: 30 Min Live Pass ($1.99) and 60 Min Live Pass ($3.99) in A La Carte section
